codeReview.summary: The feature replaces the prior green/sage theme variables with four Catppuccin data-theme palettes, adds a persisted Zustand theme store that initializes before React renders, and swaps the last reviewed hardcoded green status styles to semantic theme tokens. I did not find a correctness gap against the milestone requirements or VAL-THEME-001 through VAL-THEME-005 in the shipped source.

summary: Pass. Commit `e17226f` implements the four-flavor Catppuccin theme system, early theme initialization, and semantic token migration without leaving `.dark` or hardcoded green regressions in the reviewed paths.
